title: Skaile Catalog Manifest
description: Defines a catalog package — a curated set of skills and flows compiled into a browsable catalog.json.

version.description: Semver version of this catalog package.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this catalog contains.

suggested_taxonomy.description: Default category tree for platforms that haven't defined their own taxonomy.

include.description: Glob patterns (relative to ai-assets/) matching SKILL.md and *.flow.yaml files to include.

exclude.description: Glob patterns to exclude from matched includes.

assets.description: Catalog entry IDs or glob patterns that belong to this category.
